## Infrastructure Services Detail

### PostgreSQL ✅

**Container:** glohib-postgres  
**Image:** pgvector/pgvector:pg16  
**Port:** 5432  
**Status:** Up ~1 hour (healthy)  
**Health Check:** pg_isready -U glohib  

**Connection String:**
```
postgresql://glohib:changeme@localhost:5432/glohib_db
```

**Verification Command:**
```bash
docker compose exec postgres pg_isready -U glohib
```

## Startup Sequence

### Recommended Order

```bash
# 1. Start all infrastructure (already running)
docker compose up -d postgres redis minio

# 2. Start all application services
docker compose up -d identity-service student-service internship-service \
                   assessment-service recommendation-service scoring-service \
                   video-service

# 3. Wait for services to be healthy (30 seconds)
sleep 30

# 4. Verify all health endpoints
curl http://localhost:8080/health
curl http://localhost:8082/health
curl http://localhost:8083/health
curl http://localhost:8084/health
curl http://localhost:8007/health
curl http://localhost:8008/health
curl http://localhost:4000/health

# 5. Start frontend
cd frontend/web
npm run dev
```

---

## Health Check Verification

### All Services Health Script

```powershell
# PowerShell script to check all services
$services = @(
    @{Name="PostgreSQL"; Url="localhost:5432"; Type="TCP"},
    @{Name="Redis"; Url="localhost:6379"; Type="TCP"},
    @{Name="MinIO"; Url="http://localhost:9010"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Identity"; Url="http://localhost:8080/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Student"; Url="http://localhost:8082/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Internship"; Url="http://localhost:8083/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Assessment"; Url="http://localhost:8084/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Recommendation"; Url="http://localhost:8007/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Scoring"; Url="http://localhost:8008/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Video"; Url="http://localhost:4000/health"; Type="HTTP"},
    @{Name="Frontend"; Url="http://localhost:3000"; Type="HTTP"}
)

foreach ($service in $services) {
    Write-Host "Checking $($service.Name)..." -NoNewline
    try {
        if ($service.Type -eq "TCP") {
            $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient
            $tcp.ConnectAsync($service.Url.Split(':')[0], [int]$service.Url.Split(':')[1]).Wait(1000) | Out-Null
            if ($tcp.Connected) {
                Write-Host " ✅ OK" -ForegroundColor Green
            } else {
                Write-Host " ❌ FAILED" -ForegroundColor Red
            }
        } else {
            $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $service.Url -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing
            if ($response.StatusCode -eq 200) {
                Write-Host " ✅ OK" -ForegroundColor Green
            } else {
                Write-Host " ❌ FAILED" -ForegroundColor Red
            }
        }
    } catch {
        Write-Host " ❌ FAILED" -ForegroundColor Red
    }
}
```

---

## Known Issues

### Issue 1: Application Services Not Started

**Impact:** Frontend cannot function without backend APIs  
**Resolution:**
```bash
docker compose up -d
```

### Issue 2: Frontend Not Started

**Impact:** No user interface available  
**Resolution:**
```bash
cd frontend/web
npm run dev
```

### Issue 3: Missing API Keys

**Impact:** OAuth and AI features will not work  
**Resolution:** Update `.env` with:
- OPENAI_API_KEY
- GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
- GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET

---

## Monitoring Recommendations

### Real-time Monitoring

```bash
# Watch all container status
watch -n 2 'docker compose ps'

# Tail all logs
docker compose logs -f

# Tail specific service
docker compose logs -f identity-service
```

### Resource Usage

```bash
# Docker stats
docker stats --format "table {{.Name}}\t{{.CPUPerc}}\t{{.MemUsage}}\t{{.NetIO}}"
```
